channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Neuralink's Arbaugh to Headline 2026 Robotics Summit
item.description:
Noland Arbaugh, Neuralink's first human patient, headlines the 2026 Robotics Summit and teases new thought-controlled tech milestones.

Key points:
• Arbaugh will deliver a closing keynote at the Robotics Summit & Expo (May 27–28, Boston), sharing his firsthand experience as Neuralink's first human implant patient.
• A live demonstration is planned, including Arbaugh controlling a physical chess board — moving pieces using only his thoughts via the brain-computer interface.
• The keynote will explore how the Neuralink N1 implant translates motor cortex signals into device control, and what it signals for the future of BCI-enabled robotics.
• Arbaugh joins a high-profile speaker lineup that includes leaders from Boston Dynamics, Agility Robotics, General Motors, and Universal Robots.

Read the full article: Neuralink's Arbaugh to Headline 2026 Robotics Summit

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
